name: analysis-and-visualization-of-home-budget
title: Analysis and visualization of home budget
shortDescription: Program which automatically generates financial reports based on incomes and spendings data. There are various scenarios available which consider one month, whole year or any chosen time span.

name: weather-forecasting-accuracy-assessment
title: Weather forecasting accuracy assessment
shortDescription: Using open weather API, correlation between forecasted and actually registered temperatures was analyzed. The analysis was carried out for several locations around the world.

name: zombie-apocalypse-simulation
title: Zombie apocalypse simulation
shortDescription: Simulation of a battle between a group of people and zombies taking place in a closed and limited space. The characters of each of the two classes have their own fighting strategy, with humans' strategy being parameterized, which allows it to be optimized.
